TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dave Batton nalecuhan i Baltimore, Maryland, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Dave Batton i 1978 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 62, namapili' tu nu New Jersey Nets putiput. 3 bulad 26 demiad, 1956 a mihca, Dave Batton, miunduay.
S.PHON: da*ə batton nar~ɾəʦuħan i bar~ɾtimorə, marjr~ɾand, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. da*ə batton i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu nəw *ərsə nəts putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, da*ə batton, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Dave Batton nalecuhan i Baltimore, Maryland, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Dave Batton i 1978 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 62, namapili' tu nu New Jersey Nets putiput. 3 bulad 26 demiad, 1956 a mihca, Dave Batton, miunduay.
S.PHON: da*ə batton nar~ɾəʦuħan i bar~ɾtimorə, marjr~ɾand, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. da*ə batton i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu nəw *ərsə nəts putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, da*ə batton, miunduaj.
